scope: Internal post-CTA product flow only. The landing page remains outside this redesign.

businessModel.freeSprint: The first account-less visitor sprint gets 3 fully checked names.
businessModel.paidPack: Every paid startup uses a one-time $5 Launch Pack for 50 names.
businessModel.authGate: Login or signup is required before payment and before account routes.

primaryFlow.goal: Collect a one-line startup brief and name styles, then generate 3 free names when eligible or route to auth and checkout for the Launch Pack.
Authenticated/deep-link version of the same composer.
Show the animated naming progress checklist before routing to free results or paid success.
Show 3 fully checked free names, the Launch Pack boundary, non-data decoy teaser rows, and after unlock the searchable/filterable 50-name bundle in batches.
Authenticate the demo user and resume checkout or account routes.
Create the demo account and resume checkout or dashboard.
Simulate the one-time $5 Launch Pack payment, show the order summary, then show the All set success state.

secondaryRoutes.goal: Authed naming history with search, a new sprint card, and project cards.
Authed shortlist of saved names with copy and Porkbun actions.
Project-level shortlist view using the same saved-name presentation.
Authed markdown report export entry point.
Deep link to the expanded evidence report for a single name.
Authed account profile, preferences, privacy, and danger-zone UI.
Authed per-startup Launch Pack status, compact pack history with load more/show less, and no credit-balance or remaining-name language.

deferredExternalIntegrations: Hosted Lemon Squeezy or Stripe checkout
Payment, report export, deletion, and support audit events
